name: tenancy-ledger-monorepo
description: Monorepo do Tenancy Ledger: API NestJS e frontend administrativo React.

scripts.test:e2e: npm run --workspace backend test:e2e:ci && npm run --workspace frontend e2e
scripts.api:generate: npm run --workspace backend openapi:generate && npm run --workspace frontend api:generate
scripts.api:check: npm run --workspace backend openapi:check && npm run --workspace frontend api:check
